name: Tex-Mex Caviar
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Low-fat or low-calorie Italian dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the frozen black eyed peas.
2. Mix the peas with the chopped red peppers, green peppers, onion, jalapeno, and parsley.
3. Add the low-fat or low-calorie Italian dressing to taste.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
